'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 82''' was the eighty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 23]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Palpatine/Legends#Palpatine reborn (4 ABY–11 ABY)|Resurrection of Palpatine]]
